mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'CUSTOMER'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, nickname, phone, email, role, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{role}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET coins = coins + #{coins}, checkin_streak = #{checkinStreak}, last_checkin_date = CURRENT_DATE WHERE id = #{id}
